textByHash.08969877315f7dad8b9102986fbf3ae1304bf8e5: Indeed it is. Daeyalt ore is a weaker form of daeyalt essence. It still has uses, hence why we have the slaves mine it. The essence here is far more powerful though.
textByHash.0ab0b701c535995be73789191f5d57f208d579eb: Well, Vampyre, welcome to the essence mine.
textByHash.24d4e29c10e80dcc2386f16505165615f561bf33: It comes in two forms, essence and ores. Both have their uses, but the essence is far more powerful.
textByHash.24e5932431b906083266c3e5a68c80bd7934a127: As you wish. I'll give any shards I convert straight to you. How many would you like me to convert?
textByHash.289dc2d173930a05b70fd047a17b37565d67ff6a: That's right. Here, we use the slaves to mine daeyalt essence.
textByHash.42459a74dd2e6d54c6086dbb78be17f5f27e4432: If you do choose to mine the deposits, you should know that the daeyalt shards you'll get are useless on their own. They'll need converting into essence to be used.
textByHash.4695f5c2fda9a2d6230bb7006900f1720111d1d0: Whenever you have shards to convert, bring them to me. Normally I'd send the converted essence straight to your bank, but as you seem to carry all of your belongings yourself, I'll just give it right to you instead.
textByHash.4acd3c30144a739631d33c0b17503fb489af67b1: As you wish. Once I convert these shards, I will send them to your bank. How many would you like me to convert?
textByHash.4b4a70c45a865d4e615c0f707c87179092f778e8: Its main use is as a key component in the vampyrification process. There's other uses though. It can be used to create runes, for example.
textByHash.8dd9c2d3e3f6342168d77a0fb7d3b20eaa5e98d6: Luckily for you, I can provide that service.
textByHash.a3ea9fe3d5d33807c6bf824c4d03b247d30ebb10: The main use of daeyalt is as a key component in the vampyrification process. There's other uses though. The essence can be used to create runes, for example.
textByHash.b36c3da56aa860725b3ebdb946a205a3f97f8886: You new here? I don't recognise you.
textByHash.b39d27ff0225b8ae08ce13e878c3b3e8746366bc: Oh, one other thing. The daeyalt almost seems to have a mind of its own. Only one deposit will be active at a time. You'll need to pay attention to which one it is.
textByHash.bb34340c62c5f0a31b9f727cc0c17641ed66ddfa: Yes. They say that an object of great power was once stored in this very cave. Apparently, the presence of this object created the daeyalt deposits.
textByHash.bd547e82610afb3356505a08e474c7861917f6b6: Whenever you have shards to convert, bring them to me. I will send the converted essence straight to your bank.
textByHash.c11a5a64ec925ed9babf9bf0b81b923d45703019: Indeed. However, you should know that the daeyalt shards you'll get are useless on their own. They'll need converting into essence to be used. That is a service I can provide.
textByHash.c83fe69b637c9a8bac4e47a32171d463bb952bef: The essence mined by the slaves is reserved. If you want some, you'll have to mine your own.
textByHash.df99b3c5780af6d83972fa06a0f5eabb3d96db13: They say that an object of great power was once stored in this very cave. Apparently, the presence of this object created the daeyalt deposits.
textByHash.ea2ce19edd95f03108484b7b720f044551a353d8: You're not one of the slaves assigned to this mine! Go back to the pens before I call the guards!
